name: WebGrabPlus
description: WebGrab+Plus is a multi-site incremental XMLTV EPG grabber. It collects TV program guide data from selected TV guide websites for your favourite channels, including detailed descriptions, categories, and images. Works great as EPG source for Tvheadend, Emby, Plex, and other PVR backends.

paths.name: Config
paths.description: WebGrab+Plus configuration files (WebGrab++.config, siteini, cron jobs).

paths.name: Data Output
paths.description: Output directory for the generated guide.xml file. To use with Tvheadend, share this path or point TVH's WebGrab grabber module to this location.

variables.name: Timezone
variables.description: Timezone for the container and EPG data.
